package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerCachingUnboundedCacheMap() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_caching_unbounded_cache_map"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Caching. Flag package-level cache maps without size, TTL, or eviction policy."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
